# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.


## 2026-03-12

### AGIBOT Showcases Full Robot Lineup at AWE 2026
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/agibot-showcases-full-robot-lineup-at-awe-2026
- Summary: AGIBOT showcased its full robot family—Yuanzheng, Lingxi, Jingling, and Kuo—at AWE 2026, demonstrating humanoid robots performing calligraphy, comedy, and dance with natural interaction.

### Tencent’s WorkBuddy Agent Tool Adds Direct WeChat Integration
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/tencent-s-work-buddy-agent-tool-adds-direct-we-chat-integration
- Summary: Tencent's AI agent WorkBuddy has been updated to support direct WeChat connectivity, allowing users to remotely command their desktop AI via mobile messages.

### CarbonSeeker’s Consumer Continuous-Fiber 3D Printer Raises $4.7M on Kickstarter
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/carbon-seeker-s-consumer-continuous-fiber-3-d-printer-raises-4-7-m-on-kickstarter
- Summary: Shenzhen-based Anisoprint raised over $4.7 million on Kickstarter for its FibreSeeker 3—the world's first consumer continuous carbon fiber 3D printer priced under $3,000.

- Summary: Zero One Automotive has secured 1.2 billion RMB in new funding to scale its intelligent electric truck production, targeting 5,000 units in 2026 to become the "Tesla of heavy trucks."

- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/c12-ai-raises-7-m-to-advance-ai-scientist-robotics-for-drug-discovery
